fields.returns: The number of normalized coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.

params.coords: A span that receives the normalized variation coordinates.

fields.summary: Fills the provided span with the current normalized variation coordinates of the font.

params.coords: A read-only span of design-space coordinate values, one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation coordinates using design-space values.

params.coords: A read-only span of normalized variation coordinate values (typically in the range -16384 to 16384), one per variation axis.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation coordinates using pre-normalized values.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance to apply.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation coordinates to match the specified named instance.

params.variations: A read-only span of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.Variation" /> values specifying the axis tags and their desired design-space values.

fields.summary: Sets the font's variation axes to the specified design-space values.

fields.value: An array of normalized variation coordinates, one per axis, or an empty array if no variation coordinates are set.
fields.summary: Gets the current normalized variation coordinates of the font.
